innateAbility.name: Predator
innateAbility.description: Attacks apply an additional physical spell damage instance based on the target's current health and Viper's level.

abilities.name: Poison Attack
abilities.description: Intensifies Viper's venom, adding an effect to his normal attack that applies a stacking movement speed slow and magic resistance reduction while dealing damage over time.

abilities.name: Nethertoxin
abilities.description: Releases a Nethertoxin at the area-targeted location, affected enemy units take an increasing damage over time based on the duration they remain in it.

abilities.name: Corrosive Skin
abilities.description: Exudes an infectious toxin that damages and slows the attack speed of any enemy that damages the Netherdrake within the radius.

abilities.name: Nosedive
abilities.description: The Netherdrake slams into the ground, applying a more potent Corrosive Skin to enemy units within the radius.

abilities.name: Viper Strike
abilities.description: Breaks the targeted enemy unit's passive abilities, slows its movement speed and attack speed, while dealing damage over time.The slowing effect reduces incrementally over the duration of the ability.

talents.left: +0.35 Predator Health Loss to Damage Factor
